description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named lint-and-test that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Run five separate ubuntu-latest jobs: lint-docs, lint-code, lint-style, lint-typing, and test. Each job checks out the repository, sets up a specified Python version, installs tox, and then runs a specific tox command. The test job runs on a matrix of Python versions 3.7 through 3.12.
